data.title: FS launches N8550-24CD8D, a 200G switch for AI storage & transition to seamless 400G networks.
data.description: A new high-performance 200G switch, the N8550-24CD8D, has been unveiled by FS in New Castle, Delaware. This switch allows for AI storage access and facilitates seamless upgrades from 100/200G to 400G in data center networks.

data.title: Spotlight partners with Profound to enhance B2B technology brands' visibility in AI search, aiding in reputation management.
data.description: In Missouri, the world's leading analyst relations agency, Spotlight, has revealed a new partnership with Profound, the initial platform dedicated to aiding corporations in enhancing their presence in AI search. This endeavor provides B2B technology firms with a significant edge: the AI search insights and optimization resources of Profound, paired with Spotlight's adept counsel on upkeeping reputation across two reputable AI platforms.

data.title: Convergence Networks sees 238% growth in internal password management with Bitwarden adoption, boosting client deployments.
data.description: Bitwarden, a prominent figure in password and secrets management, has revealed that Convergence Networks, a leading managed service provider in North America catering to heavily regulated sectors, experienced a notable surge in employee password manager adoption by 238% subsequent to switching to Bitwarden from their former system. This advancement empowered the MSP to expedite client implementations through Bitwarden's partner initiative. The company achieved this through the utilization of event logging and single sign-on technology.

data.title: Borderlands® 4 available for pre-order on Nintendo Switch™ 2, launching Oct 3, 2025. Mayhem on-the-go experience.
data.description: Today, 2K and Gearbox Software revealed that Borderlands® 4 for the Nintendo Switch™ 2 is now open for pre-orders. The highly-anticipated game is set to be released on October 3, 2025. This edition marks the latest addition to the popular Borderlands franchise. Players can enjoy the chaos of this looter-shooter game on the portable Nintendo Switch™ 2 System. The team at Gearbox is excited to provide this experience on the Nintendo Switch platform.

data.title: SkyDrive demonstrates eVTOL aircraft at Expo 2025 in Osaka, with further flights planned until August 24.
data.description: SkyDrive Inc., a top eVTOL aircraft manufacturer in Japan, has recently completed a successful demonstration flight of their SKYDRIVE model SD-05 at Expo 2025 in Osaka, Kansai. The company will be conducting additional demo flights until August 24. This exciting showcase of the SKYDRIVE's capabilities will continue at the Expo Vertiport. This news highlights the innovative strides made by SkyDrive in the field of eVTOL aircraft, a technology that is gaining significant attention and interest worldwide.

data.title: AIS renews all six Microsoft Solution Partner designations, showcasing elite Microsoft cloud expertise globally.
data.description: AIS, a prominent company specializing in cloud innovation and digital transformation based in Reston, Virginia, has recently renewed all six of its Microsoft Solution Partner designations, solidifying its status as one of the top Microsoft partners worldwide. This accomplishment highlights AIS's expertise and reliability in the Microsoft ecosystem. Furthermore, this renewal ensures AIS's ongoing recognition as a Microsoft Cloud Solutions Partner, a prestigious title awarded to partners showcasing outstanding proficiency in various Microsoft Cloud services.

data.title: U.S. employers optimistic about hiring, need skilled entry-level workers. Gap in skills seen, training needed for candidates.
data.description: In Los Angeles, a recent study conducted by Lifelong Learning Administration Corporation (LLAC) found that companies in the U.S., regardless of size, are facing a shortage of skilled entry-level workers. Employers have expressed concerns over the lack of necessary skills and certifications in job candidates. The survey revealed that a majority of businesses believe that additional job training and early exposure in high school would greatly benefit aspiring workers. LLAC, a nonprofit organization that offers support to educational institutions, conducted the independent survey to gather employer perspectives on this issue.

data.title: Kelly named Leader and Star Performer in IT, Engineering Staffing by Everest Group. First company to achieve this in all four assessments.
data.description: Kelly has achieved the distinct honor of being recognized as a Leader and Star Performer in all four Everest Group US Contingent Staffing PEAK Matrix® Assessments. This marks a significant achievement for the company in the realm of contingent staffing, highlighting their exceptional performance across the board. This recognition further solidifies Kelly's position as a leader in the industry, showcasing their exemplary performance and leadership in the field. It underscores their commitment to excellence and innovation in contingent staffing services.

data.title: Removery analyzed data from 200,000 individuals in the U.S., Canada, and Australia to uncover top tattoo removal trends.
data.description: Analysis from Removery, a global expert in tattoo removal, has revealed trends and demographics based on data from a multinational database of more than 200,000 individuals in the U.S., Canada, and Australia. The study focused on those seeking removal of over X number of tattoos.

data.title: Ishidori Matsuri in Kuwana City, Mie, Japan, known as the Noisiest Festival, to be held on August 2nd and 3rd. UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage event. Strengthening internationalization efforts.
data.description: Kuwana City in Mie Prefecture, Japan, around 20 minutes away from Nagoya station by train, has intensified its internationalization initiatives and information sharing since last year to evolve into a globally inviting city. The renowned Kuwana Ishidori Matsuri, a UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage event, is scheduled for August 2nd and 3rd this year, at Kuwana Sosha (Kasuga Shrine). This UNESCO-acclaimed festival attracts a significant number of attendees each year, contributing to the city's goal of global openness.
